rows.label: qev056503_MSG0001
rows.name:
Help! The Guard Machines have gone
berserk, and the Biahno Water
Purification Plant is in danger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0010
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details about what is happening.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask if Rosie is safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0002
rows.name:
The Guard Machines went berserk
and started firing at me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0003
rows.name: I tried to force a shutdown, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now the Biahno Water Purification
Plant's operating equipment has
gone into thermal runaway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm sure it's because the Guard Machines
have been shooting randomly, but I can't
stop them, so I'm completely helpless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0006
rows.name:
It became more than I could handle
alone, so I thought I had to
evacuate and call for backup...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0007
rows.name:
Thanks. It's just a
scratch, so I'm fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0008
rows.name:
The Guard Machines went berserk
and started firing at me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0009
rows.name:
I tried to force a
shutdown somehow, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now the Biahno Water Purification
Plant's operating equipment has
gone into thermal runaway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm sure it's because the Guard Machines
have been shooting randomly, but I can't
stop them, so I'm completely helpless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0012
rows.name:
It became more than I could handle
alone, so I thought I had to
evacuate and call for backup...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0013
rows.name:
For a Guard Machine to attack
Earthlings or this facility
is normally impossible...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0014
rows.name:
We equipped the Guard Machines
with a function to self-destruct
if they attack an ally.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0015
rows.name:
I cannot believe this is
a mere malfunction...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0016
rows.name: Does that mean someone set this up?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0017
rows.name:
We won't know for certain
until we investigate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0018
rows.name:
In any case, what we do know
right now is that this is a major
crisis for the Orphe as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0019
rows.name:
If the Biahno Water Purification Plant
is destroyed, we won't be able to
mass-produce Senirapa Water either![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0020
rows.name:
Right. If we leave this situation as it
is, there's no telling what will happen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0021
rows.name:
Requesting backup from BLADE will take
time... I can count on you, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod firmly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0041
rows.name: Shake your head and shrug.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0022
rows.name: I knew I could.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0023
rows.name:
We have to do this, so please!
Neither Tan'osarag nor I can fight,
so you're the only one left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0024
rows.name:
Please destroy all the Guard Machines.
As long as a forced shutdown is impossible,
that is the only way to stop them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0025
rows.name:
The Biahno Water Purification Plant's
operating equipment can be controlled
by a switch in the control room.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0026
rows.name:
If you cut the power, the thermal
runaway should settle down.
Please handle that as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0027
rows.name:
We will definitely uncover the cause
later. Therefore, for now, please focus
solely on stopping their rampage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0028
rows.name: I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0029
rows.name:
Turn off the operating equipment switch to stop
the thermal runaway at the Biahno Water Purification
Plant! And please destroy the Guard Machines![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0030
rows.name:
Thank you! Thanks to you, the Biahno
Water Purification Plant is safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0031
rows.name:
I inspected the broken Guard Machines,
and I have found the cause.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0032
rows.name: It was the work of a traitor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0033
rows.name:
A traitor? Is there an enemy
spy among us Earthlings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0034
rows.name: No... It was one of ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0035
rows.name:
I thought the Orpheans had their
thoughts and consciousness unified
by that Ovah thing, didn't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0036
rows.name: There was an exception...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0037
rows.name:
One of the first Orpheans brought to
Mira by Growth... His name is Rancrod.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0038
rows.name:
According to the memories inherited from
Sun'osarag, Rancrod was an Orphean whose
Ovah's power was quite diluted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0039
rows.name:
Even though the five Orpheans judged it would
be more advantageous to side with the Earthlings...
Rancrod alone remained with Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0040
rows.name:
Someone like that... But why
did he target this facility?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0041
rows.name:
That is likely because we
built the Guard Machines.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0042
rows.name:
Because they are built with Orphean
technology, it is a technology
Rancrod is very familiar with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0043
rows.name:
It's far easier to hack than
hijacking Earthling or Ma-non tech.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0044
rows.name:
I hadn't deduced that he would go beyond
merely providing technology to Growth
and launch a direct attack on us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0045
rows.name: What a troublesome enemy...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0046
rows.name:
But you know, no matter what
happens, I won't quit this job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0047
rows.name:
For the sake of the friends who died
here, I can't just give up on the
Biahno Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0048
rows.name:
Tan'osarag, build a Guard Machine that
won't lose to that Rancrod guy's hacking![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0049
rows.name:
...You aren't going to
blame me for my failing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0050
rows.name:
You guys are lending your strength for us
Earthlings. I should be thanking you. Blaming
you would be missing the point, wouldn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0051
rows.name:
Look forward to an even
better Guard Machine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0060
rows.name: Encourage[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0061
rows.name:
Say that if you meet Rancrod,
you will absolutely defeat him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_JNK0070
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_SEL0071
rows.name:
Say you wished he had told
you about the danger sooner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0051
rows.name:
I thank you. And I promise to build
an even superior Guard Machine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0052
rows.name: Yeah, I'm counting on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0053
rows.name:
Thank you too. I'm truly
grateful to both of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0055
rows.name:
You're right. If we cut off the root
of the evil, no problems will occur.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0056
rows.name:
If you ever happen to meet Rancrod,
give him a beating for me too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0057
rows.name: For me as well, please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0058
rows.name: Everyone's counting on you, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0059
rows.name:
Well then, I'm going to start the
recovery work. Thank you both for today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0060
rows.name:
I am sorry... Without sensing the will of
the Ovah, it was difficult to deduce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0061
rows.name:
However, next time, I promise to
build a superior Guard Machine that
won't lose to Rancrod's attacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0062
rows.name: Yeah, I'm counting on it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0063
rows.name:
Thank you too. I'm truly
grateful to both of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056503_MSG0064
rows.name:
I look forward to working
with you from here on out.[ST:wait ]
